title: Zelda, Legend of the Master Sword
description:
A mod inspired by Zelda - Skyward Sword, A Link to the Past and Ocarina of Time.
Embark on a journey across the lands to find the Goddess Sword.
Adventure on to unlock its true potential as the Master Sword.
body:
*** ![ZLotMS-header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_header.webp) =================================================================================================================== *** ![Fairy in a Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/gRFFDzL/fairyinabottle.gif) __**[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1197917238091579572?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&link=https://discord.gg/F3YxQBRX3P)](https://discord.gg/Kb9SmGCxBv)**__ *** ![ZLotMS-overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_about.webp) *** ### This mod is inspired mainly by Skyward Sword, A Link to the Past and Ocarina of Time, being a mix mash of elements across those and other various Zelda games.  #### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/912522/description_b4811218-f179-480f-80d3-a6efe94d5c27.gif) *** ![ZLotMS-about](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_overview.webp) =================================================================================================================== *** _In an abandoned long lost Temple, seemingly untouched by time, the great Goddess Hylia left a gift for man. Waiting to be claimed by a Hero, the Legendary Goddess Sword sleeps._ _You may embark on a journey across the overworld to collect the three Sacred Flames, to upgrade and unlock the Goddess Sword's potential. Upon infusing the Legendary Blade with the essences of Courage, Wisdom and Power, it becomes the Master Sword, gaining Link's signature spin attack special ability, that is also further improved as you still increase the power of the Master Sword._ *** ⚔️ ⚔️ **Iconic Swords** – From the **Goddess Sword** to the **Fierce Deity Blade**, including multiple variants of the **Master Sword**. 🛡️ **Defensive Tools** – Craft the **Hylian Shield**, restore the **Fighter's Shield**, upgrade them, discover their **unique effects** and **more**. 🧚 **Fairy Companions** – Collect and travel with unique fairies like **Navi, Tatl, Tael, Leaf, Neri, Ciela**, and more—each with **distinct gameplay effects**. 🎵 **Ocarina of Time** – Craft the **Fairy Ocarina** or find the **Ocarina of Time**. Play songs to summon your steed, change the weather, heal, and more. 🪝 **Hookshots, Longshots,** even a **Hypershot and Endershot?!** – Grappling tools with unique mechanics and upgrades. 🔮 **Magic System** – Use items that consume and restore **Magic Energy**, with powerful passive effects and active abilities. 🌀 **Boomerangs, Bombs, Bottles, and More** – Collect and craft classic Zelda tools. 🏰 **World Generation & Structures** – Discover **shrines, fairy fountains**, and other secrets across the world. 🧱 **New Materials & Crafting** – Mine and forge with a new **mysterious** **ore** and other materials unique to the mod. 🧝 **Sheikah Fairy (Supporter Companion)** – Unlock the exclusive **Sheikah** **Fairy** that has a defensive "Sheikah Vanish" passive ability to assist the plasyer, as a token of gratitude for donating or supporting the mod! _Sheikah Fairy_ ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/912522/description_ad58efd5-08a7-4e80-b78b-00b40e19b9c3.gif) 💖 Support this mod and unlock exclusive content like the \*\*Sheikah Fairy\*\*! \- 🌟 Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/c/MeziMods \- ☕ Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/mezimaru \- 🛍️ Discord Shop: https://discord.com/channels/1197917238091579572/shop

And that’s just the beginning — with **dozens of new items**, gameplay systems, and secrets to uncover, _The Legend of the Master Sword_ offers a deep and replayable Zelda-inspired experience inside Minecraft. #### Materials have Vanilla uses to stay relevant outside of this specific Mod. #### _The swords do not vanish if or when broken_ #### ![Fairy in a Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/gRFFDzL/fairyinabottle.gif) **Requires playerAnimator mod and its associated dependencies. Requires GeckoLib** **Compatible with Better Combat**   *** **![ZLotMS-spoilers](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_spoilers.webp)** ======================================================================================================================== ***   **📗 Fairy Spawn Locations**
Show List - **Healing Fairy** – Near Fairy Fountains - **Green Fairy** – Various Forest Biomes - **Brown Fairy** – Various Desert Biomes - **Lime Fairy** – Various Jungle Biomes - **Orange Fairy** – Swamp Biomes - **Cyan Fairy** – Various Water Biomes - **Magenta Fairy** – Cherry Grove Biomes - **Gray Fairy** – Basalt Deltas Biome - **Purple** – The End - **White** – The End - **Black** – The End - **Navi** – Rarely found around the Temple of Time - **Tatl** – Rarely found in Plains Biomes when raining - **Tael** – Rarely found in Plains Biomes when raining - **Ciela** – Crafted from combining any two non-unique fairies - **Leaf** – Rarely found anywhere in The Nether - **Neri** – Rarely found in Cold Biomes at night - **Golden Fairy** – Secret Ritual requiring all 16 different fairy companions - **Sheikah Fairy** – Unique Special Fairy only awarded to donors, supporters, and contributors
--- **🎼 Ocarina - Songs & Effects**
Show List - **Song of Time** - Will teleport the player to their spawn position if a valid set spawn position is found. - **Epona's Song** - *Only in the Overworld*, will summon a familiar looking horse. The horse will be tamed and owned by the player, will be saddled, has no inventory for armor or storage and cannot mate. If played again will attempt teleport the horse to you or summon a new one if the previous is dead or cannot be found. (Try using your Hookshot on Epona) - **Zelda's Lullaby** - Will apply a short regen healing effect to all nearby non-enemy living entities after the song is played. (Will also make any nearby red Fairies glow, reset Lon Lon Cow milk cooldown and required to obtain the Golden Fairy.) - **Song of Storms** - Will change the weather. - **Sun's Song** - Will change time of day.
--- **⚒️ Crafting Recipes**
Show List **Smithing Table** - **Goddess Longsword** = Goddess Sword + Farore's Flame + Emerald - **White Goddess Sword** = Goddess Longsword + Nayru's Flame + Block of Lapis - **Master Sword** = White Goddess Sword + Din's Flame + Diamond - **Tempered Master Sword** = Master Sword + Blaze Rod + Kakariko Dwarven Alloy - **Golden Master Sword** = Tempered Master Sword + Bottle o' Enchanting + The Triforce - **Fierce Deity Sword** = Golden Master Sword + Nether Star + End Rod **Crafting Table** - **Hylian Shield** = Diamond + Shield + 2x Mysterious Scrap + Iron Ingot - **Kakariko Dwarven Alloy** = 9x Mysterious Scrap - **9x Mysterious Scrap** = Kakariko Dwarven Alloy - **Netherite Ingot** = Kakariko Dwarven Alloy + Diamond + Iron Ingot + Copper Ingot + Gold Ingot + Emerald - **Temple of Time Music Disc** = Farore's Flame + Nayru's Flame + Din's Flame - **Lingering Luck Potion** = Farore's Flame + Glass Bottle - **Lingering Swiftness Potion** = Nayru's Flame + Glass Bottle - **Lingering Regen Potion** = Din's Flame + Glass Bottle - **Hylian Bottle** = Glass Bottle - **Ciela** = Any two non-unique fairies - **Triforce of Courage** = 4x Mysterious Scrap + 4x Emerald + Farore's Flame - **Triforce of Wisdom** = 4x Mysterious Scrap + 4x Diamond + Nayru's Flame - **Triforce of Power** = 4x Mysterious Scrap + 4x End Crystal + Din's Flame - **The Triforce** = Triforce of Power + Triforce of Wisdom + Triforce of Courage - **Sword Shrine** = 4x Stone Blocks - **Longshot** = Kakariko Alloy + 2x Crying Obsidian + Chain + Hookshot - **Hypershot** = Kakariko Alloy + 2x Piston + Din's Flame + Longshot - **Endershot** = 2x Ender Pearl + 2x End Stone + Hookshot - **Fairy Ocarina** = Emerald + 3x Clay blocks
--- **🏹 How to obtain the Fairy Bow**
Show - **Place a normal Bow in a Sword Shrine and empower it with a **Healing** Fairy in a Bottle.**
--- **🗡️ How to obtain the True Master Sword**
Show - **Place a Golden Master Sword in a Sword Shrine and empower it with a Blessed Nether Star.** *(True Master Sword can cleanse zombie villagers)*
--- **🌟 How to obtain the Blessed Nether Star**
Show - **In the End, present a Nether Star to a Sword Shrine. Survive.**
--- **🌍 Locations for Structures, Items, Ore, Generations, etc**
Show List - **Goddess Sword** – Found in Temples that generate in forests, plains, and other rare biomes. - **Farore’s Flame** – Found in Mazes, which generate in plains and dense biomes. - **Nayru’s Flame** – Found in Shrines, which generate in cold biomes (including cold and frozen oceans). - **Din’s Flame** – Found in Arenas, which generate in hot or dry biomes and in jungles. - **Boomerang** – A rare drop from Skeletons and Pillagers. Also available as a trade from the Goron Merchant. - **Fire Rod** – Found semi-rarely in Bastion and Nether Fortress treasure chests. - **Ice Rod** – Found in Igloos, snowy villages, and Ancient City ice box chests. - **Hookshot** – Sold by the Goron Merchant. (Try using your Hookshot on Epona!) - **Mysterious Scrap** – A rare material mined from Kakariko Ore deep in the Nether (frequency similar to Ancient Debris). Also dropped by Piglin Brutes, found in Nether Fortress and Bastion treasure chests, and very rarely obtainable from fishing. - **Ocarina of Time** – Rarely found in simple dungeon chests (monster spawner rooms), buried treasure, woodland mansions, and stronghold libraries. Also has a very rare chance to appear as fishing treasure. - **Bottled Healing Fairy** – Right-click a red Healing Fairy with an empty Hylian Bottle to capture it. Can also be found in End City and Bastion treasure chests. - **Sheet Music — Zelda’s Lullaby** – 0.1% drop chance from any mob slain by the player. - **Sheet Music — Epona’s Song** – Found in Lon Lon Ranch, which generates in plains and savanna biomes. - **Sheet Music — Song of Storms** – Found in Windmills, which generate in plains and swamp biomes. - **Sheet Music — Sun’s Song** – Found inside Desert Pyramids.
--- **🧩 Nayru's Shrine – Riddles & Solutions**
Show Riddles - I take to the wind, soar in the sky, One with the birds, drifting gently by. – **_Feather_** - In shadows I shine with a flickering glow, A wanderer's guide where darkness would grow. – **_Torch_** - A vessel of knowledge, with pages to read, In a library's silence, is where you'll find me. – **_Book_** - I carry the calm of rivers and rain, A traveler's relief from heat and from flame. – **_Water Bucket_** - With pointed fangs and a venomous bite, I'm a creature feared, in the darkness of night. – **_Spider Eye_** - With petals of beauty, colors so bright, I'm a gift of affection, a fragrant delight. – **_Rose Bush_** - A spark of fire, bane of a liar, A useful tool, needed to cook your gruel. – **_Flint and Steel_** - A tear of the void with a traveler's grace, Throw me afar and I'll shift you through space. – **_Ender Pearl_** - From creatures of field, I am obtained, A versatile material, by artisans trained. – **_Leather_** - A crunchy snack, so crisp and bright, Underground treasure, growing in soil's embrace tight. – **_Carrot_** - I'm a sturdy metal, a construction's aid, Forged into shape, an adventurer's tools made. – **_Iron Ingot_**
![Fairy in a Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/gRFFDzL/fairyinabottle.gif) Your gift of as little as a cup of coffee will help fund continued development and support for this mod, my other mods and future mods. =) [Ko-Fi Tip/Donation Link](https://ko-fi.com/mezimaru) Feel free to use in your modpacks. (Credit would be appreciated though) _Magic Meter system in this mod is based on [KoalaLib (formerly Magic Bar Lib)](https://github.com/Deadlydiamond98/KoalaLib)  by Deadlydiamond98, licensed under the MIT License. Full attribution and the MIT license are included in the mod JAR._  ___**[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1197917238091579572?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&link=https://discord.gg/F3YxQBRX3P)](https://discord.gg/Kb9SmGCxBv)**___
